_description: Self-learning failure memory. Every fix-agent spawn records what failed, why, and what fixed it. Agents consult this before work to avoid repeating known failures. Append-only — never delete entries.

failure_categories.IMPORT_ERROR: Missing module, wrong import path, circular import
failure_categories.SYNTAX_ERROR: Python/JS/Bash syntax error in modified file
failure_categories.TEST_FAILURE: Existing tests broke after code change
failure_categories.CONFIG_ISSUE: Missing env var, wrong port, bad DB path
failure_categories.TIMEOUT: Agent or process exceeded time limit
failure_categories.HALLUCINATION: Agent produced fake data, wrong file paths, non-existent APIs
failure_categories.EMPTY_OUTPUT: Agent produced 0-byte output (CLI invocation likely broken)
failure_categories.PERMISSION_ERROR: File locked, directory not writable, auth failure
failure_categories.DEPENDENCY_CONFLICT: Package version mismatch, pip install failure
failure_categories.GIT_CONFLICT: Merge conflict, unstaged changes blocking operation
failure_categories.VISION_DRIFT: Work contradicts CEO vision or CTEM+ identity
failure_categories.QUOTA_EXHAUSTED: Claude API usage limit hit — all agents fail instantly with 'out of extra usage' (NOT a code bug, NOT retryable)

known_patterns.description: Fix agents produce 0-byte logs — Claude CLI invocation with -p flag and large prompt may silently fail or timeout
known_patterns.frequency: 39 occurrences across all historical fix-agent runs — 100% failure rate
known_patterns.root_cause: The fix-agent prompt is passed via temp file + cat, but the Claude CLI may be timing out or the prompt may exceed token limits. All 39 fix-agent logs in logs/ai-team/fix-agents/ are 0 bytes.
known_patterns.recommended_fix: 1. Check Claude CLI version compatibility with --print flag. 2. Reduce prompt size (currently includes 80 lines of log + error patterns). 3. Add explicit timeout detection. 4. Verify /opt/homebrew/bin/bash exists and works.

known_patterns.description: Agents reference suite-ui/aldeci-ui-new/ which does NOT exist on disk
known_patterns.root_cause: Aspirational directory name leaked into agent prompts. Agents created files there, which quietly succeeded (mkdir -p) but were never used.
known_patterns.recommended_fix: All agent defs now corrected. Add pre-flight check: if any agent output references aldeci-ui-new, flag as hallucination.
known_patterns.resolution: 12 corrections applied to copilot-instructions.md and 5 agent definitions

known_patterns.description: Sidebar has 8 Technical Suites instead of 5 Workflow Spaces mandated by vision
known_patterns.frequency: Persistent since UI creation — never caught until manual CEO review
known_patterns.root_cause: No agent was tasked with comparing UI navigation structure against VISION_TO_ACCOMPLISH.MD Section 4.2. Vision-agent only measured LOC/errors/coverage, not information architecture.
known_patterns.recommended_fix: 1. ux-architect agent created (Phase 2.5) to audit UI IA. 2. vision-agent Phase 10 now must check sidebar labels. 3. Sidebar restructure directive issued to frontend-craftsman.
known_patterns.resolution: MainLayout.tsx completely rewritten. 8 Technical Suites replaced with 5 Workflow Spaces: Mission Control, Discover, Validate, Remediate, Comply. Per-space accent colors. CommandPalette updated. All routes preserved.

known_patterns.description: LOC counts in agent definitions drift from reality as code evolves
known_patterns.root_cause: Agent defs snapshot file sizes at creation time. No auto-update mechanism. Over days of rapid development, counts diverge significantly.
known_patterns.recommended_fix: context-engineer runs contradiction check at end of every cycle: compare agent def claims vs actual wc -l. Update if drift >10%.
known_patterns.resolution: 28 corrections applied. Auto-check directive added to coordination notes.

known_patterns.description: Agents fail with 66-byte log: 'You're out of extra usage'. Misclassified as TIMEOUT by auto-detector. Root cause is Claude API quota depletion, not agent bug.
known_patterns.frequency: 13 agents failed across 3 swarm runs on 2026-03-03
known_patterns.root_cause: Claude API extra usage quota exhausted. Early-phase agents consumed all quota. Later agents and fix-agents created death spiral by attempting retries on a dry API.
known_patterns.recommended_fix: 1) Circuit breaker added to detect 'out of extra usage' and halt immediately. 2) Schedule swarm runs within quota window. 3) Prioritize critical agents earlier. 4) Wait for quota reset: Mar 6 3pm AEST.
known_patterns.resolution: Added QUOTA_EXHAUSTED circuit breaker to run-ctem-swarm.sh — detects 'out of extra usage', sets global flag, halts all agent launches and fix-agent spawns instantly.

known_patterns.description: Merged into KP-005: threat-architect failure was quota exhaustion, not a persona verification bug.
known_patterns.root_cause: Same as KP-005: API quota depleted

known_patterns.description: Merged into KP-005: swarm-controller failure was quota exhaustion.
known_patterns.root_cause: Same as KP-005: API quota depleted

known_patterns.description: Merged into KP-005: devops-engineer failure was quota exhaustion.
known_patterns.root_cause: Same as KP-005: API quota depleted

known_patterns.description: Recurring TIMEOUT in context-engineer: - **Status:** ❌ Failed (3 attempts exhausted)
known_patterns.root_cause: Auto-detected recurring pattern -- needs manual root cause analysis
known_patterns.recommended_fix: Investigate the repeated TIMEOUT failures for this agent
